brand_assets.description: Welcome to the World of Red Bull. Find the latest news and stories about our energy drinks, athletes, artists, content, events, livestreams and more.

parsed_output.target_audience: Adrenaline seekers, extreme athletes, and creators who push boundaries and refuse to live ordinary lives — they buy Red Bull because it fuels their refusal to settle.
parsed_output.color_style: high-contrast dark with electric blue and red
taglines: Push Beyond What The World Says You Can't
Energy That Turns Risk Into Legacy
parsed_output.social_post: Sandro Dias just dropped in from a 10-storey building. History doesn't wait for permission. RedBull GivesYouWings ShatterLimits
parsed_output.marketing_paragraph: Red Bull doesn't sell energy drinks. It fuels the maniacs who drop in from skyscrapers, the b-boys who train until their bodies break the laws of physics, and the rappers who rewrite the rules. If you're here to play it safe, this isn't for you.
parsed_output.poster_prompt: Dark moody composition with explosive motion blur and neon red and electric blue accents. Bold sans-serif typography slashed across extreme action shots of athletes mid-flight or mid-trick. High contrast shadows with bursts of kinetic energy radiating from the subject, creating a sense of defiance and raw power.
